nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 褐头山雀
nodes.summary: 褐头山雀（Willow tit，学名 Poecile montanus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: | date=2019 | title=The Breeding Bird Survey 2018 | url=https://www.bto.org/sites/default/files/bbs-report-2018.pdf | series=BTO Research Report 717 | publisher=British Trust for Ornithology | location=Thetford | isbn=978-1-912642-05-2}} The rapid decline is believed be due to three factors: habitat loss, competition for nest holes by other tits particularly blue tits, and nest predation by the great spotted woodpecker.{{Cite journal | last=Siriwardena | first=Gavin M
